qualification.education_qualification: Regular students pursuing BE/BTech (7th/8th semester) or MTech (1st/IInd year) full time course in respective discipline from a recognised Indian University/Institute, Good academic track record with ≥75% marks or ≥7.5 CGPA on a scale of 10, Minimum 7.5 CGPA or above, continuously maintained throughout in previous semesters, Regular students from AICTE approved technical institutions / UGC approved universities
qualification.details: Regular students pursuing BE/BTech (7th/8th semester) or MTech (1st/IInd year) full-time course in respective disciplines from a recognized Indian University/Institute. Good academic track record with ≥75% marks or ≥7.5 CGPA on a scale of 10. Minimum 7.5 CGPA or above, continuously maintained throughout in previous semesters. Regular students from AICTE approved technical institutions / UGC approved universities.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Electronics / Electronic & Communication Engineering / Electronic & Telecommunication / Electronic & Instrumentation / Control Engineering / Instrumentation & Telemetry / Automation & Control / Embedded System / Antenna Systems & Electromagnetics etc.
Mechanical / Armament Engineering / Defence Technology / Production Engineering etc.
Aero Engineering / Rocket Propulsion System etc.
AI & ML / Data Science / System Engineering etc.

selection_process: Merit based shortlisting Intimation to selected students through e-mail
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DRDO ARDE Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://drdo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO ARDE Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DRDO ARDE Paid Intern posts is 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Paid Intern position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies available for the Paid Intern position at DRDO ARDE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this internship?
faq.answer: Candidates must be regular students pursuing BE/BTech (7th/8th semester) or MTech (1st/IInd year) with a minimum CGPA of 7.5 from a recognized Indian University/Institute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Paid Intern posts is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend offered for this internship?
faq.answer: The stipend offered for the Paid Intern position is Rs. 5000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves merit-based shortlisting and intimation to selected students via email.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Armament Research and Development Establishment (DRDO ARDE) located?
faq.answer: DRDO ARDE is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411021.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for the DRDO ARDE Paid Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. When will the internship start?
faq.answer: The internship is scheduled to start on 30-07-2026.
